wall.title: She remembers you.
wall.body: Sign up so she doesn't forget.
maxrage.prompt: She's gone. Only one thing brings her back. Show her something soft.
maxrage.reject_not_animal: That is a sandwich. She is not calmed by sandwiches.
cameld.title: CAMEL'D.
